## Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Feature Request

A clear, concise description of the problem.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened (include error output if any).

## Steps To Reproduce

1.

## Reproduction Repo / Endpoint

- sample API endpoint
- public repro repo
- sample JSON response (redacted)

- OS:
- Node.js version: (`node -v`)
- apidrift version: (`apidrift --version`)

## Additional Context

Anything else that may help (sample config, redacted responses, etc.).
